title: The Central Laws (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 1968
full_text: The Central Laws (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 1968 केन्‍द्रीय विधि (जम्‍मू-कश्‍मीर पर विस्‍तारण) अधिनियम,1968 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196825 Act Number: 25 Enactment Date: 1968-05-24 Act Year: 1968 Short Title: The Central Laws (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 1968 Hindi Title: केन्‍द्रीय विधि (जम्‍मू-कश्‍मीर पर विस्‍तारण) अधिनियम,1968 Long Title: An Act to provide for the extension of certain Central Laws to the State of Jammu and Kashmir. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Jammu and Kashmir Affairs Enforcement Date: 15-08-1968 Notification: 15th August, 1968, vide notification No. G.S.R. 1482, dated 2nd July, 1968, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Central Laws (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 1968 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Extension and amendment of certain laws. Section 3. Construction of references to laws not in force in Jammu and Kashmir. Section 4. Construction of references to authorities where new Authorities have been constituted. Section 5. Repeals and savings. Section 6. Powers to remove difficulties. Schedule 1.
